zh.lifeSummary: 當Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk於大約1285年出生時，他的父親Boleslaw II. von Polen34歲，母親Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen37歲。他於大約1309年與Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1341年3月13日享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk于大约1285年出生时，他的父亲Boleslaw II. von Polen34岁，母亲Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen37岁。他于大约1309年与Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1341年3月13日享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Trojden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German Trachte in the south, from Middle High German tracht ‘catch of fish’ (cognate with tragen); in he north from Middle Low German dar achten ‘there in back’, hence a topographic name.

en.lifeSummary: When Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk was born about 1285, his father, Boleslaw II. von Polen, was 34 and his mother, Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, was 37. He married Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia about 1309. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 March 1341, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk est né environ 1285, son père, Boleslaw II. von Polen, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia environ 1309. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1341, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk um 1285 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boleslaw II. von Polen 34 und seine Mutter Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen 37. Er hat um 1309 Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. März 1341 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk è nato il circa 1285, il suo padre, Boleslaw II. von Polen, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia circa 1309. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 marzo 1341, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Trojden I Piast Duke of Czerskが約1285年に生まれた時，父Boleslaw II. von Polenは34歳，母Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauenは37歳であった。約1309年にMaria Rurykowicz Princess of Galiciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1341年3月13日に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk(이)가 대략 1285년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boleslaw II. von Polen(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1341년 3월 13일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk nasceu aproximadamente 1285, seu pai, Boleslaw II. von Polen, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia aproximadamente 1309. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1341, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk родился около 1285 г., его отцу по имени Boleslaw II. von Polen было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia около 1309 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 13 марта 1341 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Trojden I Piast Duke of Czersk nació aproximadamente 1285, su papá, Boleslaw II. von Polen, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Prinzessin Gaudimantė Zofia von Litauen ,Prinzessin von Litauen, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Maria Rurykowicz Princess of Galicia aproximadamente 1309. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1341, a la edad de 57 años.
